name: Ubiquiti Fiber PatchCord Cable UPC/APC, 1.5m
title: Ubiquiti Fiber PatchCord Cable UPC/APC, 1.5m
short_description: UFiber Patch Cord Cable SC/UPC - SC/APC
description: UFiber Patch Cord Cable SC/UPC - SC/APC

detailed_description.heading: Features an SC/UPC connector on one end of the cable and a SC/APC connector on the other end to help you build out your GPON network.
detailed_description.text: The UFiber Patch Cord Cable, identified by the part number UF-SM-PATCH-UPC-APC, is meticulously engineered by Ubiquiti to ensure reliable and efficient data transmission within fiber optic networks. This patch cord cable features advanced specifications and meticulous design, making it an ideal solution for various networking applications.

detailed_description.heading: Key Features
detailed_description.text:
SC/UPC to SC/APC
SM G.657A1 fiber
Simplex
2.0mm jacket PVC
1.5m length

detailed_description.heading: Construction and Design
detailed_description.text: The UF-SM-PATCH-UPC-APC patch cord cable has a length of 1.5 meters (59.1 inches), providing versatility for different networking setups. It is constructed with SM9/125 SX fiber, boasting a 2.0 mm diameter and a durable yellow PVC jacket. This PVC jacket material offers robust protection against environmental factors, ensuring long-lasting performance in indoor installations.

detailed_description.heading: Connector Technology
detailed_description.text: Equipped with SC/UPC and SC/APC connectors on either end, the UF-SM-PATCH-UPC-APC cable features a blue SC/UPC connector and a green SC/APC connector. The SC/UPC connector ensures precise signal transmission with minimal insertion loss, while the SC/APC connector utilizes angled physical contact (APC) technology to reduce back reflection and improve signal quality, particularly in applications where signal integrity is critical.

detailed_description.heading: Performance Specifications
detailed_description.text: With a low insertion loss of ≤ 0.3 dB, the UF-SM-PATCH-UPC-APC cable minimizes signal attenuation during data transmission, preserving signal integrity and ensuring efficient communication. Additionally, the cable offers impressive return loss specifications, with the SC/UPC connector providing a return loss of ≥ 50 dB and the SC/APC connector offering a return loss of ≥ 60 dB. These specifications signify excellent signal reflection performance, enhancing signal reception and overall network reliability.

detailed_description.heading: Durability and Build Quality
detailed_description.text: Crafted with precision and durability in mind, the UF-SM-PATCH-UPC-APC cable features high-quality materials and construction techniques to withstand the demands of networking environments. The PVC jacket provides robust protection against physical damage, while the SC/UPC and SC/APC connectors ensure secure and stable connections, minimizing the risk of signal degradation or interruption.

detailed_description.heading: Applications
detailed_description.text: The UF-SM-PATCH-UPC-APC patch cord cable is suitable for a wide range of applications, including telecommunications, data centers, enterprise networks, and fiber-to-the-home (FTTH) deployments. Its high-performance specifications, coupled with reliable construction, make it an ideal choice for critical networking infrastructure where signal quality and reliability are paramount.

detailed_description.heading: Quality Assurance
detailed_description.text: As a product of Ubiquiti, a leading provider of networking solutions, the UF-SM-PATCH-UPC-APC cable undergoes rigorous testing and quality assurance processes to ensure compliance with industry standards and specifications. Backed by Ubiquiti's commitment to quality and reliability, the cable offers peace of mind to users seeking dependable fiber optic connectivity solutions for their networking needs.
